last_packet.summary: Added a governance-ready eval-summary artifact and validator that suppresses candidate-win and improvement claims unless held-out scenario lists are identical and compare contracts are clean.

verification.command: python3 -m py_compile flightrecorder/eval_summary.py flightrecorder/cli.py flightrecorder/validation.py tests/test_eval_summary.py
python3 -m unittest tests.test_eval_summary tests.test_compare_rl_export tests.test_compare_gate tests.test_validation

risks: The dedicated worktree did not contain the delegated docs/agentic-finetune-* source docs or experiments tree; this packet created local Goal 7 docs and autonomy state instead of editing the shared checkout.
The new eval summary can include external adapter readiness plans, but BFCL, Inspect AI, lm-evaluation-harness, and SWE-bench adapters remain a future packet.
The system /usr/bin/python3 is Python 3.9 and cannot run the full suite because tests/test_deployment_hardening.py imports tomllib; /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 passed the full suite.
